steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The strong contrast word is ‘but’ — it signals that the missing word must mean the opposite of the deliberate, intentional behavior described in the second clause.

steps.title: Match the opposite meaning
steps.content: ‘Accidental’ (C) directly opposes ‘deliberately,’ capturing the colleagues’ skepticism about the parrot’s unintentional behavior. The other choices (A, B, D) describe qualities unrelated to intent. That matches choice C — C is correct.
